commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The PR needs contributor or maintainer revision because the proposed boundary is too weak and the external real-behavior proof gate is not satisfied.; Needs attention: The security fix is incomplete because the home boundary leaves an outside-workspace prompt-injection path open.; Review finding: [P1] Bound context loading to the workspace, not home — src/agents/sessions/resource-loader.ts:116 (sha=bcbc781e2f6f279585292949e8e89354a41b2fb5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `loadProjectContextFiles()` so ancestor `AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md` discovery stops at or outside `homedir()`.

PR surface: Source +8. Total +8 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main walks from `cwd` to `/`, and the PR still walks through home-tree parents, so a workspace under `~/.openclaw/workspace` would still load `~/.openclaw/AGENTS.md` and `~/AGENTS.md`.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor or maintainer revision because the proposed boundary is too weak and the external real-behavior proof gate is not satisfied.
